title: Find My Device - Stop button
scenario: Stop button fails to stop the tone and restore the play button when using Find My Device with a connected headset
steps: 1. Pair and connect a headset to the device.
2. Open the Find My Device app.
3. Tap the Blue Geo icon to locate the device.
4. Tap the Play button to play a tone on the device.
5. Tap the Stop button to stop the tone.
expected: The tone stops playing, and the Play button becomes available again.
